name: Vegetables Oriental Style
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch broccoli, flowers trimmed, stems peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Assemble and attach the rotor slicer/shredder using a thick slicer cone (no 3).
2. Turn to speed 4 and slice celery, broccoli stems, onions, and mushrooms, keeping each separate.
3. Heat half of oil in a 12-inch skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
4. Add celery, onions, and garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute.
5. Add sherry and cook for 30 seconds.
6. Remove from pan.
7. Heat remaining oil in the pan.
8. Add sliced broccoli stems and stir-fry until not quite tender, about 2 minutes.
9. Add mushrooms and stir-fry for 1 minute.
10. Return celery, onions, and garlic to the pan.
11. Stir-fry until hot.
12. Season with ground ginger and soy sauce.
13. Serve immediately.
